purpose: Introduce bounded shadow inference and second-pass adjudication for unresolved overlap surfaces without changing live symbolic routing yet.
non_goals: No router.py changes in the first Phase 6 implementation step
No reopening of deferred free/subsidized-care legal-basis runtime migration
current_runtime_principles_to_preserve: Regression and validation stay mandatory release gates
Clarify-first behavior remains preferred over speculative answers
Grounded answers continue to come from existing bounded owners

bounded_phase6_components.role: Produce a non-binding ranked family prediction and confidence score for each user message.
bounded_phase6_components.live_effect: None in the first step; logging only.

bounded_phase6_components.role: Record when runtime owner and shadow family disagree or when clarify/escalate outcomes cluster on known unresolved surfaces.
Only after shadow logging proves value, arbitrate among a tiny allowlisted set of candidate families on selected unresolved surfaces.
bounded_phase6_components.live_effect: Not enabled in this design pass.

recommended_rollout_sequence.name: shadow_only_logging
recommended_rollout_sequence.description: Add family prediction and disagreement logging with zero runtime effect.

recommended_rollout_sequence.name: surface_review_loop
recommended_rollout_sequence.description: Review logged disagreements only on the explicitly named unresolved surfaces.

recommended_rollout_sequence.name: bounded_adjudication_trials
recommended_rollout_sequence.description: Enable second-pass adjudication only for one unresolved surface at a time and only among an allowlisted family set.

recommended_rollout_sequence.name: promotion_after_proof
recommended_rollout_sequence.description: Promote adjudication-backed improvements only after parity, overlap safety, and regression proof.

implementation_entry_points_for_future_w.role: Attach shadow logging after runtime owner selection without changing response behavior.
Persist disagreement events and unresolved-surface tags.
Potential future home for bounded second-pass adjudication logic, still behind a strict allowlist.
Potential family/surface classification utility for shadow-only prediction.

hard_guardrails: Shadow inference must never generate answer text.
Phase 6 family predictions may only rank families, not invent policy.
Second-pass adjudication may only choose among allowlisted existing owners.
If runtime and shadow disagree without high confidence or without an allowlisted surface, keep the runtime owner or clarify.
Eligibility, complaint routing, admission policy, referral policy, medicine coverage, and legal-basis answers remain symbolic/bounded.
success_criteria: Disagreement telemetry is available per unresolved surface
No regression to existing stable owners
At least one unresolved surface becomes measurably easier to diagnose before any live routing change
